title: Complete the irregular observation-table collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python kiln_reader.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/kiln/observations kiln_snapshot.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('kiln_snapshot.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 8, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('sector', 'station', 'reading', 'observed_at')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 1, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/kiln/observations'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'sector': 'C-5', 'station': 'Tern Basin', 'reading': 901, 'observed_at': '2026-06-03T01:00:00Z'}, {'sector': 'D-8', 'station': 'Willow Reach', 'reading': None, 'observed_at': '2026-06-03T01:05:00Z'}], got [{'sector': 'x', 'station': 'C-5', 'reading': 901, 'observed_at': '2026-06-03T01:00:00Z'}, {'sector': 'x', 'station': 'Willow Reach', 'reading': None, 'observed_at': '2026-06-03T01:05:00Z'}]
request sequence mismatch: expected ['/kiln/observations?variant=2'], got None
request count mismatch: expected 1, got None
